configRows.description: seeded RMA return request (RmaType 1 = Return, RmaStateId 1 = 'Waiting for product(s) from customer', buyer 98745621) — the demo return the My returns customer-center page surfaces

OOTB status-flow proof: DW10 Order Management ships the RMA state machine (7 states: Waiting for product(s) / Received / Rejected / Sent for repair / Received from repair / Returned to customer / Sent replacement). The layer seeds NO states — they are platform defaults; this assert documents the OOTB dependency the seeded request binds to.
